commands.notes: Baseline reproduction reported 164 usages against budget 147.

commands.command: node scripts/run-smoke-suite.mjs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5273 --proxy-target http://127.0.0.1:8080 --config playwright.config.ts -- tests/smoke/platform/backoffice-ui-visual.spec.ts --grep "login page keeps a professional authentication console" --workers=1
commands.notes: Pre-change desktop and mobile login baseline passed and produced the before screenshots.

commands.notes: Tested each candidate declaration by removing only its CSS priority at runtime and comparing computed values; the temporary audit spec was removed before closure.
Confirmed the removed title style block had no component or test references.
Reported 144 usages against the ratcheted budget of 144.
Shell semantic-token and visual static contract passed.
Light and dark semantic color roles passed the configured contrast thresholds.

commands.command: npx prettier --check src/index.css src/core/layout/index.css src/modules/auth/login/components/Login.css src/modules/system/components/shared/list-page.css src/modules/system/user/user.css scripts/check-important-budget.mjs
commands.notes: All files changed in this batch match Prettier formatting.
Production build and all prebuild contract checkers passed.

commands.command: node scripts/run-smoke-suite.mjs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5273 --proxy-target http://127.0.0.1:8080 --config playwright.config.ts -- tests/smoke/platform/backoffice-ui-visual.spec.ts --grep "(login page keeps|system user page keeps|system setting overview)" --workers=1
commands.notes: Three focused visual scenarios passed across login desktop/mobile, user phone/tablet, and setting phone layouts with runtime-error capture.

commands.command: node scripts/run-smoke-suite.mjs --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5273 --proxy-target http://127.0.0.1:8080 --config playwright.config.ts -- tests/smoke/platform/backoffice-ui-visual.spec.ts --grep "system/(permission|menu).*(unified shell|screenshot evidence)" --workers=1
commands.notes: Permission and menu pages passed four desktop/1280 visual and runtime-error scenarios.

browserEvidence.notes: Final login layout preserves the baseline panel, typography, controls, and spacing.
Login controls remain visible without horizontal overflow or clipping.
Shared action spacing, shell controls, filter area, table, and pagination remain usable.
Setting overview and shared spacing remain readable at phone width.
Permission workbench description and segmented controls retain their intended geometry.
Shared list actions and shell controls retain their visual hierarchy.

runtimeLogs: Focused Playwright scenarios captured browser console and page errors; no disallowed runtime errors were observed.
runtimePerformance: Login baseline-to-final pixel differences were 0.1074% at 1440x900 and 0.1552% at 390x844, limited to rendering/caret-level pixels on visual inspection.
knownGaps: GitHub-hosted required checks remain part of the later PR and human gate.
Full-repository format checking was not rerun because 24 unrelated pre-existing files remain outside this batch; every changed frontend source file passed targeted Prettier.
Remaining !important declarations are still technical debt, but the deterministic budget now blocks any increase above 144.
